title: anthemis rigida subsp. amorgina
intro: Anthemis rigida subsp. amorgina, also known as Amorgos Anthemis, is a subspecies of the Anthemis rigida plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Amorgos Anthemis are thought to include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
